title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 21–24, this part focuses on Unknown person #17, Unknown person #18, Unknown person #19, Zoro, Unknown person #20, Kid as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Don't be so hasty to die...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Are you that young swordsman's comrade?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: To just watch from the sidelines....!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 13 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
